response:
Emily started with twenty five dogs at her center located at [address] and received four puppies on Thursday from [town name]. On Friday a stray dog arrived from [donor name] bringing the total count up to thirty dogs before any adoptions occurred on Saturday.

***

Two families adopted three dogs each on Saturday so six dogs left the shelter at [adoption date] leaving nineteen dogs remaining for [rescue name]. The final count is now nineteen dogs ready for [contact person] to help find [new home] for each animal.
